text:
Created attachment 236943
gtop-1.1.3

Description:

gtop is a system monitoring dashboard for terminal written in
Javascript that offers information such as CPU, Memory, Swap,
Network, Disk usage and Processes currently running.

QA:

* portlint: OK (looks fine.)
* testport: OK (poudriere: 13.1, amd64)
